Mini Spec

Problem

Users currently have no way to attach inline review comments to generated HTML artifacts. Reviewers fall back to ad-hoc Slack threads which lose anchor context.

Solution

Introduce a sidecar comments.json with dual anchors (id-first then quote-fallback Bitap). The resolver dispatches a generic subagent that calls each originating skill's apply-edit-at-anchor entrypoint.

Rollout

Ship per-skill contract tests before flipping the resolver on. Each of the 14 originating skills owns its own shim under scripts/.
